top_signals.title: China confirms order for 200 Boeing planes, calls aviation key area for U.S. cooperation
top_signals.summary: China has agreed to buy 200 Boeing jets, its first major order in nearly a decade, U.S. President Donald Trump said last week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: French Parliament Approves Macron’s Pick to Run Central Bank
top_signals.summary: Emmanuel Macron’s nominee to run the Bank of France was confirmed by parliament, avoiding a political setback for the president and relieving uncertainty for the European Central Bank as it weighs interest-rate increases.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Emerging Stocks at Two-Week Low, Currencies Stay Under Pressure
top_signals.summary: Currencies in India and Indonesia edged off record lows after central banks stepped up efforts to stem the losses, while swaps priced a South African interest-rate hike, reflecting the continued heavy pressure on emerging markets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Guidance: Cash Equivalent Transfer Values guidance
top_signals.summary: Technical note on the discount rates to be used by the scheme managers of public service pension schemes in calculating transfers payable from the schemes.

top_signals.title: Orban’s Fall and Europe’s Rise
top_signals.summary: The dawn of a strange new European consensus.
